title: Chinese.Food
description: Chinese New Year is coming! The China Town gets quite busy and happy! The streets are decorated with red lanterns and New Year scrolls. Ever wanted to have a taste of Chinese food? Now you can! Product Feature: - Choose from Chinese delicious dishes and snacks. Dumpling Sweet and Sour Chicken Chinese Noodles - Cook them in different ways, Boil, chop, Steam, fry, Puree and more. - Varieties of ingredients and condiments to be prepared. - Exploring cooking by using varieties of ingredients in creative ways. - Useful kitchen tools: whisk, flour stranding machine,rolling pin and so many more. - Choose your favorite kitchen sauce: soy, sesame, peanut sauce and more! - Funny character reaction will make you giggle. - No rules or stress. Have crazy kitchen fun.
